title: gentiana rubicunda subsp. samolifolia
intro: Gentiana rubicunda subsp. samolifolia is a subspecies of the Gentiana rubicunda plant, commonly known as the mountain gentian, which is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Gentiana rubicunda subsp. samolifolia are believed to include its anti-inflammatory properties and its potential to improve digestion and reduce nausea. In herbal preparations, Gentiana rubicunda subsp. samolifolia is often used to make teas and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
